summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Justitia AI - Criminal Appeal Case Management system. Backend APIs working at 96.3% success rate with full CRUD operations, AI report generation, and authentication. Frontend UI fully functional with successful case management, document upload, timeline events, AI-powered report generation, and barrister presentation views.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 instead of expected 404 for invalid report type
minor_issues.impact: Minor - correct behavior (400 Bad Request is appropriate)

resolved_issues.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in case creation
resolved_issues.resolution: Fixed by ensuring proper exclusion of MongoDB _id field in all endpoints

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all elements
Create new case with all fields
